name: spec-to-code-drift-detector
summary: Detects divergence between approved specifications and current repository behavior.

name: code-to-spec-reconciliation
summary: Proposes controlled specification updates when valid repository behavior is not represented upstream.

name: manual-edit-preservation
summary: Preserves manual edits across regeneration using ownership, protected regions, semantic identity, and version history.

name: incremental-regeneration-planner
summary: Creates the smallest safe regeneration plan for an approved change request.

name: change-set-impact-analyzer
summary: Analyzes proposed repository changes across behavior, contracts, data, security, operations, and cost.

name: architecture-drift-detector
summary: Detects repository structures and runtime topology that violate the approved architecture baseline.

name: database-api-compatibility-check
summary: Checks schema, migration, REST, RPC, event, and webhook compatibility for a change set.
depends_on: PG114 PG115 PG116 PG117 PG124 PG175

name: refactoring-and-upgrade-bridge
summary: Plans controlled framework, runtime, dependency, and structural upgrades within Project Synthesis.

name: human-approval-gate
summary: Manages scoped approvals for high-impact change, reconciliation, repair, security, data, and delivery decisions.

name: git-pr-delivery-manager
summary: Packages approved incremental changes into reviewable commits and pull or merge requests.

name: synthesis-agent-orchestrator
summary: Coordinates specialist agents, skills, tools, approvals, budgets, and state transitions for Project Synthesis.

name: planner-coder-reviewer-agent-team
summary: Defines separated planner, implementer, reviewer, tester, security, and certifier responsibilities.

name: skill-discovery-and-routing
summary: Discovers and ranks Skills by contract compatibility, capability, policy, language, domain, and evidence quality.

name: skill-input-output-contract-validator
summary: Validates Skill manifests, schemas, preconditions, outputs, evidence, and version compatibility.

name: skill-sandbox-permission-enforcer
summary: Enforces process, filesystem, network, repository, secret, deployment, and data capabilities for Skills and agents.

name: model-routing-and-budget-controller
summary: Routes tasks across models and controls token, latency, monetary, and retry budgets.

name: context-pack-builder
summary: Builds minimal, source-grounded context packs for each specialist agent.

name: domain-pack-sdk
summary: Defines packaging, extension, validation, testing, and publication contracts for Domain Packs.

name: template-skill-marketplace-publisher
summary: Publishes governed Skills, templates, profiles, and Domain Packs into an internal or external marketplace.

name: skill-version-compatibility-manager
summary: Manages Skill, schema, template, model adapter, and Domain Pack compatibility across platform releases.

name: golden-project-benchmark-suite
summary: Defines representative benchmark projects across languages, architectures, and risk levels.

name: requirements-understanding-eval
summary: Evaluates extraction, ambiguity handling, scope, conflict detection, assumptions, and acceptance criteria.

name: architecture-quality-eval
summary: Evaluates architecture simplicity, fit, boundaries, tradeoffs, security, data ownership, and operability.

name: code-correctness-eval
summary: Evaluates semantic correctness, maintainability, contract conformance, language idioms, and generated-code governance.

name: build-run-success-eval
summary: Evaluates clean setup, build, migration, startup, health, smoke, shutdown, and evidence reproducibility.

name: security-compliance-eval
summary: Evaluates threat controls, authorization, tenant isolation, supply chain, secrets, data handling, and compliance evidence.

name: traceability-completeness-eval
summary: Evaluates end-to-end lineage from source requirements through code, tests, evidence, releases, and change history.

name: regeneration-safety-eval
summary: Evaluates idempotency, incremental scope, manual-edit preservation, merge behavior, and regression safety.

name: cross-language-parity-eval
summary: Compares Java, Python, and .NET implementations of the same approved specification.

name: large-project-scalability-eval
summary: Evaluates performance and reliability of synthesis on large repositories, specifications, graphs, and change sets.

name: failure-recovery-chaos-eval
summary: Evaluates recovery from model, tool, runner, network, registry, storage, broker, and approval interruptions.

name: project-synthesis-product-certification
summary: Combines benchmark and policy evidence into a versioned product certification decision.
depends_on: PG192 PG193 PG194 PG195 PG196 PG197 PG198 PG199 PG200 PG201

name: saas-admin-domain-pack
summary: Provides reusable multi-tenant SaaS administration concepts, workflows, permissions, integrations, and tests.

name: ecommerce-order-domain-pack
summary: Provides catalog, cart, order, payment orchestration, fulfillment, return, and refund domain models.

name: warehouse-logistics-domain-pack
summary: Provides inventory, location, receiving, picking, packing, shipment, task, and optimization domain concepts.

name: manufacturing-mes-iot-domain-pack
summary: Provides plant, equipment, work order, operation, quality, maintenance, telemetry, and traceability models.

name: energy-ems-vpp-domain-pack
summary: Provides assets, meters, forecasts, dispatch, constraints, tariffs, markets, settlement, and flexibility models.

name: healthcare-clinical-admin-domain-pack
summary: Provides patient administration, scheduling, encounter, order, result, consent, billing, and audit models.

name: digital-twin-domain-pack
summary: Provides physical assets, twin models, telemetry, state estimation, simulation, commands, scenarios, and calibration concepts.

name: ai-agent-rag-domain-pack
summary: Provides knowledge source, ingestion, retrieval, prompt, tool, agent, memory, evaluation, and safety domain models.

name: data-platform-analytics-domain-pack
summary: Provides source, pipeline, dataset, schema, quality, lineage, metric, dashboard, and access-control models.

name: workflow-approval-domain-pack
summary: Provides configurable forms, cases, tasks, states, rules, approvals, escalations, SLAs, and audit models.

name: requirement-studio-ui
summary: Provides the interactive workspace for natural-language discovery, source review, requirements, assumptions, conflicts, scope, and baselines.

name: architecture-review-ui
summary: Provides interactive architecture diagrams, ADRs, tradeoffs, risks, threats, deployment, and approval views.

name: project-preview-and-diff-ui
summary: Provides repository tree, generated-file preview, ownership, symbol trace, semantic diff, and regeneration review.

name: build-run-console-ui
summary: Provides live and historical build, test, startup, smoke, repair, and environment evidence views.

name: artifact-evidence-explorer
summary: Provides searchable lineage and evidence navigation across requirements, code, tests, builds, security, deployments, and releases.

name: collaborative-comment-approval
summary: Provides reusable comments, mentions, assignments, decisions, approvals, exceptions, and notification workflows.

name: tenant-policy-and-quota
summary: Provides tenant administration for policy, capabilities, models, registries, runners, budgets, retention, and quotas.

name: generation-usage-metering
summary: Meters model, tool, runner, storage, network, artifact, and support usage by tenant, project, run, and feature.

name: support-diagnostic-bundle
summary: Creates privacy-safe diagnostic packages for failed or degraded synthesis runs.

name: feedback-to-skill-learning-loop
summary: Converts user feedback, defects, review findings, support cases, and evaluation failures into governed Skill improvements.
